prompt: If your writing style were a material (wood, brass, cotton, glass, concrete, etc.), which would it be and why?
response: If my writing style were a material, it would be glass. Glass is transparent, elegant, and fluid like the language I aim to convey. It has the ability to reflect and refract light, much like my work can evoke emotions and open new perspectives. It is strong and durable, symbolizing the clarity and resilience of my words. Yet, it is also delicate and vulnerable, reminding us of the fragility and sensitivity we must maintain when communicating with others.
